name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0002
purpose: Make MixtarRVS Toolkit resolve first inside an explicitly entered session without changing boot, PID 1, OpenRC, SSH, or global Alpine login profiles.
non_goals: Do not remove Alpine fallback commands.
known_limitations: MixtarRVS sh resolves first in the session, but is not yet certified as the default Base Closure script driver.
Stage 0002 sources the profile from the existing login shell and then resolves external commands through MixtarRVS first.
PID 1 scripts, initramfs scripts, and service orchestration must wait for explicit shell/runtime certification.
